Solar panels convert sunlight into electricity via photovoltaic cells made of semiconductor materials, generating an electric current when excited by sunlight; modern residential systems can substantially reduce household electricity usage, though efficiency depends on panel orientation, shading, and climate.

def count_vowels(s):
    return sum(1 for c in s if c.lower() in 'aeiou')
